title: Burning flesh - The mark of the beast - Marijuana leaf burn tatoo.

transcript.text: It's red hot. Grab this, and before it cools down at all, I'll stick it in my arm.
It has to be red hot. Do it. On the other side, yeah.
And hit it really fast and really hard so that it doesn't hurt.
Shh, right there. Really fast. Harder and faster.
Okay, now hold it down. Push it down. Wiggle it.
Yeah, don't wiggle it. But when it cools down, let go of it and let it just hang out there.
Let it hang out. It's cool.
Isn't that cool? Now when you pull it, it'll pull the skin with you.
And it didn't hurt at all, by the way. It didn't hurt me at all.
It's going to hurt when it's all scabby and gross.
Oh, shoot. I should have done that with you there.
It came out and it pulled all the skin with it. It's pretty cool looking.
